title: HAI KHAT PAN IN DAWN KHAWM

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Up leh zuih ki khat hi hang
Taang misiang te bang in ah
Kha Siangtho khat bek sung ah
Hai khat pan ih dawn khawm hi

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Eite pumkhat hi hang Zeisu sung ah
Eite pumkhat hi hang Zeisu sung ah
Eite pumkhat hi hang Zeisu sung ah
Zeisu sung ah Zeisu sung ah
Eite pumkhat hi hang Zeisu sung ah

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Itna'n khau bang hong khih Zeisu sung ah
Itna'n khau bang hong khih Zeisu sung ah
Itna'n khau bang hong khih Zeisu sung ah
Zeisu sung ah Zeisu sung ah
Itna'n khau bang hong khih Zeisu sung ah

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Khut kilen in sem ni Zeisu sung ah
Khut kilen in sem ni Zeisu sung ah
Khut kilen in sem ni Zeisu sung ah
Zeisu sung ah Zeisu sung ah
Khut kilen in sem ni Zeisu sung ah
